markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential SEO collaboration between ChangeEngine and fwd.digital, focusing on optimizing ChangeEngine's existing programmatic landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ChangeEngine has 700 AI-generated landing pages with minimal keyword optimization, yielding some leads but significant room for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers comprehensive SEO services, including research, content creation, and optimization, with a focus on programmatic and editorial approaches](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Potential collaboration would involve a 90-day pilot at $9-12K/month, with emphasis on improving existing pages and identifying new opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)

## Topics

### ChangeEngine's Current SEO Efforts

  - [700 template landing pages created using AI, with minimal keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Surprisingly generating a few leads daily despite lack of optimization](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Using tools like originality.ai to attempt humanizing AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Creating additional 40 "ask for" pages to expand content offerings](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### fwd.digital's SEO Approach

  - [Comprehensive research process:](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [Analyzing company context, target personas, and jobs to be done](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [Generating potential queries and identifying audience competitors](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [Conducting gap analysis and creating content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Content creation workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
      - [Utilizes multiple APIs, page indexing, and scraping for research](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [Implements human review steps throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Offers both programmatic and editorial content creation options](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Content optimization and maintenance:](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [Focuses on content refreshing and programmatic enrichments](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [Emphasizes the importance of continual updates to maintain relevance](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Initial focus: Improve ChangeEngine's 700 existing landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Approach: Programmatic optimization and keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Timeline: 90-day pilot period with option to cancel](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Cost: $9-12K per month minimum engagement](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Value proposition: Rapid improvement of existing content and identification of new opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)

### Next Steps and Considerations

  - [Marcel to send SLW (Statement of Work) and add Kes to Slack Connect](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [ChangeEngine to review proposal and discuss internally](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [Potential start date: February 10th (next available kickoff slot)](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [ChangeEngine to consider budget constraints and long-term partnership potential](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send SLW, additional research, and meeting follow-up materials to Kes](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Kes to review proposal with ChangeEngine team and consider budget feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [Follow-up in a few days to discuss decision and potentially schedule a kickoff date](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [If moving forward, aim to secure a specific start date to ensure availability](https://fathom.video/share/oLueCsiAa5xfQz15rvsSKYkFiEuzZoiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
